```{r}
  mods = ~ true_biome*disease + sustained_antibiotic + sustained_probiotic + development + pregnancy + log_fava + pub_year_simple + sqrt_ste + sqrt_freq,  
  random = list(~1 | study_ID/subject_id),   
  data = cleaned_datasets$family.no_art,
  method = "REML",  
  test = "t",
  sparse = TRUE
)

model <- rma.mv(
  yi = slope,       
  V = ste,        
  mods = ~ pub_year_simple + sqrt_ste + sqrt_freq,  
  random = list(~1 | study_ID/subject_id),   
  data = cleaned_datasets$family.no_art,
  method = "REML",  
  test = "t",
  sparse = TRUE
)

summary(model)
summary(lm(fava ~ log(num_timepoint), data = cleaned_datasets$family.no_art))
hist(cleaned_datasets$family.no_art$fava)
bubble_plot(model,
                     mod = "average_turnover",
                     xlab = "average_turnover",
                     ylab = "slope",
                     group = "study_ID",
                     k = TRUE, g = TRUE,
                     legend.pos = "top.left") +
         ggtitle(paste("Bubble_plot")) +
         theme(
           axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12, colour = "black"),
           axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12, colour = "black"),
           axis.title.x = element_text(size = 12, colour = "black"),
           plot.title = element_text(size = 12, colour = "black"))

#running it on all of them:
run_meta_model <- function(data, effect_size_col, variance_col, level, no_art = FALSE) {
  # Filter data based on minimum number of taxa
  min_taxa_col <- ifelse(level == "family", "distinct_families", "distinct_genera")
  data_filtered <- data[data[[min_taxa_col]] > 9, ]
  
  # Model label
  art_status <- ifelse(no_art, "no_art", "0001")
  model_label <- paste0("mod_", ifelse(effect_size_col == "z", "ML_Z", "slope"),
                        "_full_", substr(level, 1, 3), ".", art_status)
  
  cat("##########################\n")
  cat(model_label, "\n")

  # Try sparse model first
  try_sparse <- try({
    model <- rma.mv(
      yi = data_filtered[[effect_size_col]],
      V = data_filtered[[variance_col]],
      mods = ~ true_biome*disease + sustained_antibiotic + sustained_probiotic + development + pregnancy + log_fava,
      random = list(~1 | study_ID/subject_id),
      method = "REML",
      data = data_filtered,
      sparse = TRUE,
      test = "t"
    )
  }, silent = TRUE)

  # Retry without sparse if error
  if (inherits(try_sparse, "try-error")) {
    cat("Model failed with sparse = TRUE, retrying with sparse = FALSE...\n")
    model <- rma.mv(
      yi = data_filtered[[effect_size_col]],
      V = data_filtered[[variance_col]],
      mods = ~ true_biome*disease + sustained_antibiotic + sustained_probiotic + development + pregnancy + log_fava,
      random = list(~1 | study_ID/subject_id),
      method = "REML",
      data = data_filtered,
      sparse = FALSE,
      test = "t"
    )
  } else {
    model <- try_sparse
  }

  print(summary(model))
  return(model)
}

full_models <- list()

for (name in names(cleaned_datasets)) {
  dat <- cleaned_datasets[[name]]
  level <- ifelse(grepl("genus", name), "genus", "family")
  no_art <- grepl("no_art", name)
  
  # Z effect size (e.g., transformed correlation)
  full_models[[paste0("ML_Z_", name)]] <- run_meta_model(
    dat, effect_size_col = "z", variance_col = "v", level = level, no_art = no_art)
  
  # Slope effect size
  full_models[[paste0("slope_", name)]] <- run_meta_model(
    dat, effect_size_col = "slope", variance_col = "ste", level = level, no_art = no_art)
}

full_meta_models <- extract_model_summary(full_models)

write.csv(full_meta_models, "multiple_metaregression_outputs.csv")

```

Adding facet wrapped figures for FAVA and freq, pub_year
```{r}
ext_models <- list()

moderators <- list(
  log_fava = "FAVA (log)",
  sqrt_freq = "Sampling Frequency (sqrt)",
  pub_year_simple = "Publication year"
)

for (name in names(cleaned_datasets)) {
  dat <- cleaned_datasets[[name]]
  level <- ifelse(grepl("genus", name), "genus", "family")

  for (mod_name in names(moderators)) {
    # Rho (z)
    model_z <- run_meta_model_diversity(dat, moderator = mod_name, level = level, effect_size_col = "z", variance_col = "v")
    ext_models[[paste0("diversity_", mod_name, "_z_", name)]] <- model_z

    # Slope (beta)
    model_slope <- run_meta_model_diversity(dat, moderator = mod_name, level = level, effect_size_col = "slope", variance_col = "ste")
    ext_models[[paste0("diversity_", mod_name, "_slope_", name)]] <- model_slope
  }
}

# Save summaries if needed
ext_summary <- extract_model_summary(ext_models)
all_bubbles <- c(ext_models, small_models)

facet_bubble_plots_by_moderator(ext_models)

cleaned_datasets$family.0001$pub_year

```

Bias on pipeline type and sequencing platform
```{r}
pipeline_platform <- read.csv("Final_study_list.csv")
#view(pipeline_platform)
pipeline_platform <- pipeline_platform[,c(3,4,8,9)]
cleaned_datasets_pipelines <- lapply(cleaned_datasets, function(df){
  df_merged <- df %>%
    left_join(pipeline_platform, by = c("study_ID" = "study_code"))
  df_merged$diseases <- df_merged$disease
  df_merged$diseases[which(df_merged$diseases == 0)] <- "Healthy"
  df_merged$diseases[which(df_merged$diseases == 1)] <- "Disease"
  df_merged$diseases <- relevel(
  factor(df_merged$diseases),
  ref = "Healthy")
  return(df_merged)
})

model <- rma.mv(
  yi = z,       
  V = v,        
  mods = ~ Analysis_pipeline + Sequencing_platform + experiment_type,  
  random = list(~1 | study_ID/subject_id),   
  data = cleaned_datasets_pipelines$family.no_art,
  method = "REML",  
  test = "t",
  sparse = TRUE
)

#BIAS TESTING FINAL
bias_models <- list()
moderators <- list(
  Analysis_pipeline = "pipeline",
  Sequencing_platform = "platform",
  sqrt_freq = "Sampling Frequency (sqrt)",
  pub_year_simple = "Publication year",
  experiment_type = "experiment type"
)

for (name in names(cleaned_datasets_pipelines)) {
  dat <- cleaned_datasets_pipelines[[name]]
  level <- ifelse(grepl("genus", name), "genus", "family")

  for (mod_name in names(moderators)) {
    # Rho (z)
    model_z <- run_meta_model_diversity(dat, moderator = mod_name, level = level, effect_size_col = "z", variance_col = "v")
    bias_models[[paste0("diversity_", mod_name, "_z_", name)]] <- model_z

    # Slope (beta)
    model_slope <- run_meta_model_diversity(dat, moderator = mod_name, level = level, effect_size_col = "slope", variance_col = "ste")
    bias_models[[paste0("diversity_", mod_name, "_slope_", name)]] <- model_slope
  }
}

# Save summaries if needed
all_biases <- c(bias_models, small_models)
bias_models_summary <- extract_model_summary(bias_models)
all_bias_summary <- rbind(bias_models_summary, small_model_table)
write.csv(all_bias_summary, "all_bias_pipelines.csv")
view(bias_models_summary)

```

Running the model with the biases
```{r}
run_meta_model_bias <- function(data, effect_size_col, variance_col, level, no_art = FALSE) {
  # Filter data based on minimum number of taxa
  min_taxa_col <- ifelse(level == "family", "distinct_families", "distinct_genera")
  data_filtered <- data[data[[min_taxa_col]] > 9, ]
  
  # Model label
  art_status <- ifelse(no_art, "no_art", "0001")
  model_label <- paste0("mod_", ifelse(effect_size_col == "z", "ML_Z", "slope"),
                        "_full_", substr(level, 1, 3), ".", art_status)
  
  cat("##########################\n")
  cat(model_label, "\n")
  data_filtered$sqrt_v <- sqrt(data_filtered[[variance_col]])

  # Try sparse model first
  try_sparse <- try({
    model <- rma.mv(
      yi = data_filtered[[effect_size_col]],
      V = data_filtered[[variance_col]],
      mods = ~ true_biome*disease + sustained_antibiotic + sustained_probiotic + development + pregnancy + log_fava + pub_year_simple + sqrt_freq + experiment_type,
      random = list(~1 | study_ID/subject_id),
      method = "REML",
      data = data_filtered,
      sparse = TRUE,
      test = "t"
    )
  }, silent = TRUE)

  # Retry without sparse if error
  if (inherits(try_sparse, "try-error")) {
    cat("Model failed with sparse = TRUE, retrying with sparse = FALSE...\n")
    model <- rma.mv(
      yi = data_filtered[[effect_size_col]],
      V = data_filtered[[variance_col]],
      mods = ~ true_biome*disease + sustained_antibiotic + sustained_probiotic + development + pregnancy + log_fava + pub_year_simple + sqrt_freq + sqrt_v + experiment_type,
      random = list(~1 | study_ID/subject_id),
      method = "REML",
      data = data_filtered,
      sparse = FALSE,
      test = "t"
    )
  } else {
    model <- try_sparse
  }

  print(summary(model))
  return(model)
}

full_models_bias <- list()

for (name in names(cleaned_datasets_pipelines)) {
  dat <- cleaned_datasets_pipelines[[name]]
  level <- ifelse(grepl("genus", name), "genus", "family")
  no_art <- grepl("no_art", name)
  
  # Z effect size (e.g., transformed correlation)
  full_models_bias[[paste0("ML_Z_", name)]] <- run_meta_model_bias(
    dat, effect_size_col = "z", variance_col = "v", level = level, no_art = no_art)
  
  # Slope effect size
  full_models_bias[[paste0("slope_", name)]] <- run_meta_model_bias(
    dat, effect_size_col = "slope", variance_col = "ste", level = level, no_art = no_art)
}

full_meta_models_bias <- extract_model_summary(full_models_bias)

write.csv(full_meta_models_bias, "multiple_metaregression_bias_outputs.csv")


```

Last thing: rerunning the meta-analytic means with the new biases
```{r}
run_meta_model_bias <- function(data, level = "family", effect_size_col = "z", variance_col = "v") {
  # Filter based on minimum taxa
  min_taxa_col <- ifelse(level == "family", "distinct_families", "distinct_genera")
  data_filtered <- data[data[[min_taxa_col]] > 9, ]
  data_filtered$sqrt_v <- sqrt(data_filtered[[variance_col]])

  # Fit multilevel model
  model <- rma.mv(
    yi = data_filtered[[effect_size_col]],
    V = data_filtered[[variance_col]],
    mods = ~ pub_year_simple + sqrt_freq + experiment_type,
    random = list(
      ~1 | study_ID,
      ~1 | subject_id,
      ~1 | biome_ID
    ),
    method = "REML",
    data = data_filtered,
    sparse = TRUE
  )

  return(model)
}

meta_models_bias <- list()

for (name in names(cleaned_datasets_pipelines)) {
  dat <- cleaned_datasets_pipelines[[name]]
  level <- ifelse(grepl("genus", name), "genus", "family")

  # Rho model
  model_rho <- run_meta_model_bias(dat, level = level, effect_size_col = "z", variance_col = "v")
  model_name_rho <- paste0("mod_rho_", name)
  meta_models_bias[[model_name_rho]] <- model_rho

  # Slope model
  model_slope <- run_meta_model_bias(dat, level = level, effect_size_col = "slope", variance_col = "ste")
  model_name_slope <- paste0("mod_slope_", name)
  meta_models_bias[[model_name_slope]] <- model_slope
}

meta_model_bias_summary <- extract_model_summary(meta_models_bias)

write.csv(meta_model_bias_summary, "meta_means_bias.csv")

```

Making some plots to better understand the multiple regression results
```{r}
df <- read.csv("multiple_metaregression_outputs.csv")
model_names <- c(rep("Effect Size Z: Family (Artefacts)", 14), rep("Effect Size Beta: Family (Artefacts)", 14), rep("Effect Size Z: Family", 14), rep("Effect Size Beta: Family", 14), rep("Effect Size Z: Genus (Artefacts)", 14), rep("Effect Size Beta: Genus (Artefacts)", 14), rep("Effect Size Z: Genus", 14), rep("Effect Size Beta: Genus", 14))
df$model_name <- model_names
df <- df[which(str_detect(df$model_name, "Artefacts") == F),]

df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    term = fct_recode(term,
      "Intercept" = "intrcpt",
      "Body Site: Oral" = "true_biomeoral",
      "Body Site: Resp." = "true_biomerespiratory",
      "Body Site: Skin" = "true_biomeskin",
      "Body Site: Vaginal" = "true_biomevaginal",
      "Disease" = "disease",
      "Antibiotics" = "sustained_antibiotic",
      "Probiotics" = "sustained_probiotic",
      "Infancy" = "development",
      "Pregnancy" = "pregnancy",
      "Log(FAVA)" = "log_fava",
      "Oral × Disease" = "true_biomeoral:disease",
      "Resp. × Disease" = "true_biomerespiratory:disease",
      "Vaginal × Disease" = "true_biomevaginal:disease"
    ),
    term = factor(term, levels = rev(unique(term)))  # reverse for top-down
  )

make_zval_heatmap <- function(df) {
  df <- df %>%
    mutate(
      sig = ifelse(pval < 0.05, "*", ""),
      term = factor(term, levels = rev(unique(term)))  # reverse for top-down
    )

  ggplot(df, aes(x = model_name, y = term)) +
    geom_tile(aes(fill = zval), color = "white") +
    geom_text(aes(label = sig), size = 4, vjust = 0.5) +
    scale_fill_gradient2(
      low = "blue", mid = "white", high = "red", 
      midpoint = 0, limits = c(-max(abs(df$zval)), max(abs(df$zval))),
      name = "z-score"
    ) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
      panel.grid = element_blank()
    )
}

#with biases checked now

make_zval_heatmap(df)

df2 <- read.csv("multiple_metaregression_bias_outputs.csv")
df2$model_name <- c(rep("Effect Size Z: Family (Artefacts)", 18), rep("Effect Size Beta: Family (Artefacts)", 18), rep("Effect Size Z: Family", 18), rep("Effect Size Beta: Family", 18), rep("Effect Size Z: Genus (Artefacts)", 17), rep("Effect Size Beta: Genus (Artefacts)", 17), rep("Effect Size Z: Genus", 17), rep("Effect Size Beta: Genus", 17))

df2 <- df2 %>%
  mutate(
    term = fct_recode(term,
      "Intercept" = "intrcpt",
      "Body Site: Oral" = "true_biomeoral",
      "Body Site: Resp." = "true_biomerespiratory",
      "Body Site: Skin" = "true_biomeskin",
      "Body Site: Vaginal" = "true_biomevaginal",
      "Disease" = "disease",
      "Antibiotics" = "sustained_antibiotic",
      "Probiotics" = "sustained_probiotic",
      "Infancy" = "development",
      "Pregnancy" = "pregnancy",
      "Log(FAVA)" = "log_fava",
      "Publication Year" = "pub_year_simple",
      "Sampling Freq." = "sqrt_freq",
      "Exp. Type: Assembly" = "experiment_typeAssembly",
      "Exp. Type: Metagenomic" = "experiment_typeMetagenomic",
      "Oral × Disease" = "true_biomeoral:disease",
      "Resp. × Disease" = "true_biomerespiratory:disease",
      "Vaginal × Disease" = "true_biomevaginal:disease"
    ),
    term = factor(term, levels = rev(unique(term)))  # reverse for top-down
  )


df2 <- df2[which(str_detect(df2$model_name, "Artefacts") == F),]
make_zval_heatmap(df2)

```

Making figures for disease as a moderator
```{r}
run_meta_model_disease <- function(data, level = "family", effect_size_col = "z", variance_col = "v") {
  # Filter based on minimum taxa
  min_taxa_col <- ifelse(level == "family", "distinct_families", "distinct_genera")
  data_filtered <- data[data[[min_taxa_col]] > 9, ]
  data_filtered$sqrt_v <- sqrt(data_filtered[[variance_col]])
  data_filtered$biome_disease <- interaction(data_filtered$true_biome, data_filtered$diseases, sep = ":")
  # Prettify interaction term
data_filtered$biome_disease_label <- paste0(as.character(data_filtered$true_biome),
  ": ", as.character(data_filtered$diseases)
)

levels_ordered <- c(
  "skin: Healthy",
  "gut: Healthy", "gut: Disease",
  "oral: Healthy", "oral: Disease",
  "respiratory: Healthy", "respiratory: Disease",
  "vaginal: Healthy", "vaginal: Disease"
)

data_filtered$biome_disease_label <- factor(
  data_filtered$biome_disease_label,
  levels = levels_ordered
)

  # Fit multilevel model
  model <- rma.mv(
    yi = data_filtered[[effect_size_col]],
    V = data_filtered[[variance_col]],
    mods = ~ biome_disease_label -1, ##messing around
    random = list(
      ~1 | study_ID,
      ~1 | subject_id,
      ~1 | biome_ID
    ),
    method = "REML",
    data = data_filtered,
    sparse = TRUE
  )

  return(model)
}

meta_models_disease <- list()

for (name in names(cleaned_datasets_pipelines)) {
  dat <- cleaned_datasets_pipelines[[name]]
  level <- ifelse(grepl("genus", name), "genus", "family")

  # Rho model
  model_rho <- run_meta_model_disease(dat, level = level, effect_size_col = "z", variance_col = "v")
  model_name_rho <- paste0("mod_rho_", name)
  meta_models_disease[[model_name_rho]] <- model_rho

  # Slope model
  model_slope <- run_meta_model_disease(dat, level = level, effect_size_col = "slope", variance_col = "ste")
  model_name_slope <- paste0("mod_slope_", name)
  meta_models_disease[[model_name_slope]] <- model_slope
}

meta_model_disease_summary <- extract_model_summary(meta_models_disease)

biome_base_colors <- c(
  "skin" = "#1b9e77",
  "gut" = "#d95f02",
  "oral" = "#7570b3",
  "respiratory" = "#e7298a",
  "vaginal" = "#66a61e"
)
library(colorspace)
label_colors <- c(
  "Skin: Healthy" = lighten(as.character(biome_base_colors["skin"]), amount = 0.3),
  "Gut: Healthy" = lighten(as.character(biome_base_colors["gut"]), amount = 0.3),
  "Gut: Disease" = as.character(biome_base_colors["gut"]),
  "Oral: Healthy" = lighten(as.character(biome_base_colors["oral"]), amount = 0.3),
  "Oral: Disease" = as.character(biome_base_colors["oral"]),
  "Respiratory: Healthy" = lighten(as.character(biome_base_colors["respiratory"]), amount = 0.3),
  "Respiratory: Disease" = as.character(biome_base_colors["respiratory"]),
  "Vaginal: Healthy" = lighten(as.character(biome_base_colors["vaginal"]), amount = 0.3),
  "Vaginal: Disease" = as.character(biome_base_colors["vaginal"])
)

orchard_plot(meta_models_disease$mod_slope_family.no_art, 
             mod = "biome_disease_label", 
             xlab = "Effect size Beta",
             group = "study_ID",  k = TRUE, g = FALSE, trunk.size = 1.5,)

orchard_plot(
  meta_models_disease$mod_slope_family.no_art,
  mod = "biome_disease_label",
  xlab = "Effect size Beta",
  group = "study_ID",
  k = TRUE,
  g = FALSE,
  trunk.size = 1.5
) +
  scale_color_manual(values = label_colors) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = label_colors)


plot_list_disease <- lapply(names(meta_models_disease)[c(3,4,7,8)], function(name) {
  model <- meta_models_disease[[name]]
  
  # Determine effect type and level
  effect <- if (str_detect(name, "slope")) "Beta" else "Z"
  level <- if (str_detect(name, "genus")) "Genus" else "Family"
  artifact <- if (str_detect(name, "no_art")) "No Artifacts" else "With Artifacts"
  
  # Create label
  plot_title <- paste(level, "-", effect, "-", artifact)
  
  # Make orchard plot
  p <- orchard_plot(
  model,
  mod = "biome_disease_label",
  xlab = paste("Effect size", effect),
  group = "study_ID",
  k = TRUE,
  g = FALSE,
  trunk.size = 1.5
) +
  scale_color_manual(values = label_colors) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = label_colors)+
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("Skin", "Gut", "Gut (Dis.)", "Oral", "Oral (Dis.)", "Resp.", "Resp. (Dis.)", "Vag.", "Vag. (Dis.)"))
  
  return(p)
})

# Combine with patchwork
library(patchwork)
combined_plot <- wrap_plots(plotlist = plot_list_disease, ncol = 2)
combined_plot



```
